## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check scripts/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] A CV still renders: `python3 scripts/generate_cv.py cv/master.md`
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] No personal data, secrets, or generated PDFs committed
